option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AdaptiveStudyTracker</string> <string name="add_task">Add Task</string> <string name="title_dashboard">Dashboard</string> <string name="title_schedule">Schedule</string> <string name="title_focus">Focus</string> <string name="title_insights">Insights</string> <string name="title_settings">Settings</string> <string name="create_task_title">Create Task</string> <string name="edit_task_title">Edit Task</string> <string name="task_title_hint">Task title</string> <string name="task_category">Category</string> <string name="task_due_time">Due time</string> <string name="no_due_time_selected">No due time selected</string> <string name="pick_due_time">Pick due time</string> <string name="task_daily_reminder">Daily reminder</string> <string name="task_importance">Importance (1 to 5)</string> <string name="save_task">Save Task</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="mark_done">Mark as done</string> <string name="delete_task">Delete task</string> <string name="task_history">Task history</string> <string name="more_actions">More actions</string> <string name="delete_all_completed">Delete all completed tasks</string> <string name="no_completed_tasks">No completed tasks yet.</string> <string name="restore_task">Restore to schedule</string> <string name="daily">daily</string> <string name="off">off</string> <string name="importance_1">1: least important</string> <string name="importance_2">2</string> <string name="importance_3">3</string> <string name="importance_4">4</string> <string name="importance_5">5: most important</string> <string name="task_meta_format">%1$s | importance %2$d | due %3$s</string> <string name="task_reminder_format">Reminder: %1$s</string> <string name="dashboard_subtitle">Live updates of your day and completion momentum.</string> <string name="today_screen_time_title">Today Screen Time</string> <string name="app_screen_time_title">App Screen Time</string> <string name="today_focus_time_title">Today Focus Time</string> <string name="recent_completed_tasks_title">Recent Completed Tasks</string> <string name="no_recent_completed_tasks">No completed tasks yet. Finish one task to see it here.</string> <string name="recent_task_meta_format">%1$s | importance %2$d</string> <string name="untitled_task">Untitled task</string> <string name="insights_subtitle">Your weekly focus and screen-time trends (Mon-Sun).</string> <string name="insights_usage_access_hint">Grant Usage Access in Settings to include screen-time bars in this chart.</string> <string name="insights_weekly_chart_title">Weekly Focus vs Screen Time</string> <string name="insights_legend_focus">Focus time</string> <string name="insights_legend_screen">Screen time</string> <string name="insights_most_productive_day_format">Most productive day: %1$s (%2$s focus)</string> <string name="insights_total_focus_week_format">Total focus this week: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_total_screen_week_format">Total screen time this week: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_average_focus_day_format">Average daily focus: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_week_range_format">Week: %1$s - %2$s</string> <string name="chart_legend_dot">●</string>
<string name="usage_access_explanation">Grant Usage Access so the dashboard can display your screen time. Tap the button, find this app, and enable it.</string> <string name="grant_usage_access">Grant Usage Access</string> <string name="usage_access_required">grant access to view</string> <string name="total_screen_time_placeholder">Total screen time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="app_screen_time_placeholder">App screen time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="total_focus_time_placeholder">Today\'s focus time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="total_screen_time_format">Total screen time: %1$s</string> <string name="app_screen_time_format">App screen time: %1$s</string> <string name="total_focus_time_format">Today\'s focus time: %1$s</string> <string name="total_focus_format">Today\'s Focus: %1$02d:%2$02d</string> <string name="focus_subtitle">Stay in the zone. Start a session below.</string> <string name="focus_mode_pomodoro">Pomodoro</string> <string name="focus_mode_infinite">Infinite</string> <string name="focus_mode_countdown">Countdown</string> <string name="focus_mode_infinite_label">INFINITE MODE</string> <string name="focus_mode_countdown_label">COUNTDOWN</string> <string name="countdown_duration_label">SESSION DURATION</string> <string name="countdown_duration_default">30 min</string> <string name="tap_to_change">Tap to change →</string> <string name="set_duration_title">Set Session Duration</string> <string name="set_duration_hint">Choose hours and minutes for your focus session</string> <string name="hours_label">h</string> <string name="minutes_label">m</string> <string name="focus_mode">FOCUS MODE</string> <string name="break_mode">BREAK MODE</string> <string name="silence_notifications_during_focus">Silence other app notifications during focus</string> <string name="dnd_status_off">Notification suppression is off.</string> <string name="dnd_status_permission_needed">Allow Do Not Disturb access to suppress notifications.</string> <string name="dnd_status_ready">Suppression is ready and will start with focus timer.</string> <string name="dnd_status_active">Suppression active during current focus session.</string> <string name="focus_timer_default">25:00</string> <string name="total_focus_default">Today\'s Focus: 00:00</string> <string name="content_desc_start_pause">Start or pause focus timer</string> <string name="content_desc_stop">Stop and reset focus timer</string> <string name="focus_session_interrupted">Focus session ended after leaving Focus tab.</string>
<!-- Settings Fragment (added by Amy) --> <string name="settings_section_usage">Phone Usage</string> <string name="settings_section_sleep">Sleep Schedule</string> <string name="settings_section_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="settings_section_tracking">Usage Tracking</string> <string name="daily_usage_limit_default">Daily screen time limit: 2h 0m</string> <string name="bedtime_label">Bedtime</string> <string name="wakeup_label">Wake up time</string> <string name="enable_task_reminders">Enable task reminders</string> <string name="enable_usage_warnings">Enable usage limit warnings</string> <string name="enable_usage_tracking">Enable background usage tracking</string> <string name="share_daily_summary">Share Daily Summary</string>
<!-- Calendar Import (added by Amy) --> <string name="import_from_calendar">Import from Calendar</string> <string name="no_upcoming_events">No upcoming events found in the next 7 days</string> <string name="select_all">Select All</string> <string name="import_selected">Import Selected</string> <string name="no_events_selected">Please select at least one event</string> <string name="import_result">Successfully imported %d task(s)</string> <string name="import_result_with_skip">Imported %d task(s), skipped %d duplicate(s)</string> <string name="calendar_import_success">Tasks updated from calendar</string> <string name="calendar_permission_denied">Calendar permission is needed to import events</string>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">AdaptiveStudyTracker</string> <string name="add_task">Add Task</string> <string name="title_dashboard">Dashboard</string> <string name="title_schedule">Schedule</string> <string name="title_focus">Focus</string> <string name="title_insights">Insights</string> <string name="title_settings">Settings</string> <string name="create_task_title">Create Task</string> <string name="edit_task_title">Edit Task</string> <string name="task_title_hint">Task title</string> <string name="task_category">Category</string> <string name="task_due_time">Due time</string> <string name="no_due_time_selected">No due time selected</string> <string name="pick_due_time">Pick due time</string> <string name="task_daily_reminder">Daily reminder</string> <string name="task_importance">Importance (1 to 5)</string> <string name="save_task">Save Task</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="mark_done">Mark as done</string> <string name="delete_task">Delete task</string> <string name="task_history">Task history</string> <string name="more_actions">More actions</string> <string name="delete_all_completed">Delete all completed tasks</string> <string name="no_completed_tasks">No completed tasks yet.</string> <string name="restore_task">Restore to schedule</string> <string name="daily">daily</string> <string name="off">off</string> <string name="importance_1">1: least important</string> <string name="importance_2">2</string> <string name="importance_3">3</string> <string name="importance_4">4</string> <string name="importance_5">5: most important</string> <string name="task_meta_format">%1$s | importance %2$d | due %3$s</string> <string name="task_reminder_format">Reminder: %1$s</string> <string name="dashboard_subtitle">Live updates of your day and completion momentum.</string> <string name="today_screen_time_title">Today Screen Time</string> <string name="app_screen_time_title">App Screen Time</string> <string name="today_focus_time_title">Today Focus Time</string> <string name="recent_completed_tasks_title">Recent Completed Tasks</string> <string name="no_recent_completed_tasks">No completed tasks yet. Finish one task to see it here.</string> <string name="recent_task_meta_format">%1$s | importance %2$d</string> <string name="untitled_task">Untitled task</string> <string name="insights_subtitle">Your weekly focus and screen-time trends (Mon-Sun).</string> <string name="insights_usage_access_hint">Grant Usage Access in Settings to include screen-time bars in this chart.</string> <string name="insights_weekly_chart_title">Weekly Focus vs Screen Time</string> <string name="insights_legend_focus">Focus time</string> <string name="insights_legend_screen">Screen time</string> <string name="insights_most_productive_day_format">Most productive day: %1$s (%2$s focus)</string> <string name="insights_total_focus_week_format">Total focus this week: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_total_screen_week_format">Total screen time this week: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_average_focus_day_format">Average daily focus: %1$s</string> <string name="insights_week_range_format">Week: %1$s - %2$s</string> <string name="chart_legend_dot">●</string>
<string name="usage_access_explanation">Grant Usage Access so the dashboard can display your screen time. Tap the button, find this app, and enable it.</string> <string name="grant_usage_access">Grant Usage Access</string> <string name="usage_access_required">grant access to view</string> <string name="total_screen_time_placeholder">Total screen time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="app_screen_time_placeholder">App screen time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="total_focus_time_placeholder">Today\'s focus time: 00:00:00</string> <string name="total_screen_time_format">Total screen time: %1$s</string> <string name="app_screen_time_format">App screen time: %1$s</string> <string name="total_focus_time_format">Today\'s focus time: %1$s</string> <string name="total_focus_format">Today\'s Focus: %1$02d:%2$02d</string> <string name="focus_subtitle">Stay in the zone. Start a session below.</string> <string name="focus_mode_pomodoro">Pomodoro</string> <string name="focus_mode_infinite">Infinite</string> <string name="focus_mode_countdown">Countdown</string> <string name="focus_mode_infinite_label">INFINITE MODE</string> <string name="focus_mode_countdown_label">COUNTDOWN</string> <string name="countdown_duration_label">SESSION DURATION</string> <string name="countdown_duration_default">30 min</string> <string name="tap_to_change">Tap to change →</string> <string name="set_duration_title">Set Session Duration</string> <string name="set_duration_hint">Choose hours and minutes for your focus session</string> <string name="hours_label">h</string> <string name="minutes_label">m</string> <string name="focus_mode">FOCUS MODE</string> <string name="break_mode">BREAK MODE</string> <string name="silence_notifications_during_focus">Silence other app notifications during focus</string> <string name="dnd_status_off">Notification suppression is off.</string> <string name="dnd_status_permission_needed">Allow Do Not Disturb access to suppress notifications.</string> <string name="dnd_status_ready">Suppression is ready and will start with focus timer.</string> <string name="dnd_status_active">Suppression active during current focus session.</string> <string name="focus_timer_default">25:00</string> <string name="total_focus_default">Today\'s Focus: 00:00</string> <string name="content_desc_start_pause">Start or pause focus timer</string> <string name="content_desc_stop">Stop and reset focus timer</string> <string name="focus_session_interrupted">Focus session ended after leaving Focus tab.</string>
<string name="settings_section_usage">Phone Usage</string> <string name="settings_section_sleep">Sleep Schedule</string> <string name="settings_section_notifications">Notifications</string> <string name="settings_section_tracking">Usage Tracking</string> <string name="daily_usage_limit_default">Daily screen time limit: 2h 0m</string> <string name="bedtime_label">Bedtime</string> <string name="wakeup_label">Wake up time</string> <string name="enable_task_reminders">Enable task reminders</string> <string name="enable_usage_warnings">Enable usage limit warnings</string> <string name="enable_usage_tracking">Enable background usage tracking</string> <string name="share_daily_summary">Share Daily Summary</string>
<string name="import_from_calendar">Import from Calendar</string> <string name="no_upcoming_events">No upcoming events found in the next 7 days</string> <string name="select_all">Select All</string> <string name="import_selected">Import Selected</string> <string name="no_events_selected">Please select at least one event</string> <string name="import_result">Successfully imported %d task(s)</string> <string name="import_result_with_skip">Imported %d task(s), skipped %d duplicate(s)</string> <string name="calendar_import_success">Tasks updated from calendar</string> <string name="calendar_permission_denied">Calendar permission is needed to import events</string>
</resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <!-- Base application theme. --> <style name="Base.Theme.AdaptiveStudyTracker" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <!-- Customize your light theme here. --> <!-- <item name="colorPrimary">@color/my_light_primary</item> --> </style>
<style name="Theme.AdaptiveStudyTracker" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.NoActionBar"> <item name="colorPrimary">#2196F3</item> </style> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?><!-- Sample data extraction rules file; uncomment and customize as necessary. See https://developer.android.com/about/versions/12/backup-restore#xml-changes for details. --> <data-extraction-rules> <cloud-backup> <!-- TODO: Use <include> and <exclude> to control what is backed up. <include .../> <exclude .../> --> </cloud-backup> <!-- <device-transfer> <include .../> <exclude .../> </device-transfer> --> </data-extraction-rules>
